positive: A majestic silhouette of a playful arctic fox interacting with minimalist celestial elements. The fox is depicted in dynamic motion, surrounded by abstract geometric constellations and glowing nebula dust. The scene utilizes a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blues, icy turquoise, and brilliant silver/gold highlights. Focus on clean, sharp lines and stylized shapes. Minimal background detail to ensure print readability. Style: modern vector illustration combined with ethereal cosmic art. Composition: Central, balanced, and impactful, ideal for large apparel prints. Lighting: Dramatic, originating from the glowing celestial elements, casting stark contrast on the silhouette. Aspect: Perfect square.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, complex background, realism, photo, gradient, smudge
